id.description: Stable id used as the segment id prefix and as the hidden input id.

value.description: Bindable code value. Defaults to an empty string.

length.description:
Number of segments to render. Normalized to an integer in `[1, 12]`;
non-finite or out-of-range values fall back to `6`.

mode.description: Character set accepted in each segment. Defaults to `'numeric'`.

masked.description: Render segments as password-style fields without changing the emitted value.

label.description: Visible group label rendered above the segments.

hideLabel.description: Visually hide the rendered `label` while keeping it programmatically associated.

aria-label.description: Group accessible name when no visible `label` is supplied.

aria-labelledby.description: Space-separated list of ids that label the group when no `label` is supplied.

description.description: Optional description text rendered below the segments.

error.description: Optional error message; sets `aria-invalid="true"` on every segment.

disabled.description: Disable every segment and the hidden input.

required.description: Mark the group as required for assistive technology.

name.description: Form-control name applied to the hidden `<input>` that submits with the form.

class.description: Extra class names appended to the root group element.

unsupportedProps.name: autocomplete
unsupportedProps.description:
`autocomplete` value applied to the first segment. Defaults to
`'one-time-code'` so iOS and Android can autofill SMS codes.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description:
Fires only for user-initiated committed value changes (typing, paste,
autofill, backspace). Never fires for external prop synchronization.
